scene_1.visual_plan: Begin with a medium shot of the model looking directly at the camera, utilizing a smooth handheld motion to create an engaging and intimate atmosphere, with a shallow depth of field that keeps the focus on her face against a softly blurred background. After the first spoken line, cut to a close-up of the product held in the model's right hand, positioned near her face to highlight the product details, ensuring the camera captures the label clearly. Transition back to the medium shot as the model continues to speak, maintaining eye contact and a natural pacing. Introduce a secondary angle showing the product from a slightly lower perspective, with the model explaining how she uses the serum while holding it in her hand, ensuring the product is still the focal point. Conclude the scene with the model returning to the original medium shot, holding the product in her right hand visible in the frame while delivering her closing lines, creating a sense of warmth and authenticity.
scene_1.dialogue: まつげケア、もっと早く始めればよかったと後悔しています。敏感で弱いまつげに悩み、いろいろ試したのにほとんど伸びなかったからです。そんな時、ETERNAL EYELASH Premiumに出会い、正直、最初から違いました。まつげエクステをしていても刺激がなく、まつげは目に見えてふさふさになり、強くなりました。本当に長持ちする良いまつげが欲しいなら、これは間違いなく画期的なアイテムです。
